title: A thought about $finish and $display outside an initial block

features.name: $finish system task in always block
features.description: Code should include a $finish system task placed inside an always block rather than an initial block
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (di < 4'b1100) do <= di; else begin $display("%t di value %d", $time, di); $finish; end end

features.name: $display system task in always block
features.description: Code should include a $display system task placed inside an always block rather than an initial block
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (di < 4'b1100) do <= di; else begin $display("%t di value %d", $time, di); $finish; end end
